title: Give Me Freshening Breeze, My Boys
content:
'Give me freshening breeze, my boys,
        A white and swelling sail,
        A ship that cuts the dashing waves,
        And weathers every gale.
        What life is like a sailor's life,
        So free, so bold, so brave?
        His home the ocean's wide expanse,
        A coral bed his grave.'
meaning:
This evocative piece by Louisa May Alcott, titled "Give Me Freshening Breeze, My Boys", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
